hero.title: Master Digital Marketing
hero.subtitle: The world's most advanced multilingual encyclopedia for Digital Marketing 5.0 — from absolute beginner to autonomous mega-scale mastery. Authored by Coach Roued El Fadhel.

features.title: The Complete Digital Marketing 5.0 System
features.subtitle: Every pillar of modern and future marketing — structured, sequenced, and AI-augmented.

attention.title: Attention Engineering
attention.desc: Master the science of capturing and holding attention in the hyper-fragmented digital economy.

loyalty.title: Loyalty 5.0
loyalty.desc: Engineer deep customer loyalty using RFM segmentation, community building, and emotional AI.

agentic.title: Agentic Marketing
agentic.desc: Deploy autonomous AI agents that market, sell, and scale your business 24/7 without human intervention.

ecommerce.title: E-Commerce Mastery
ecommerce.desc: From your first product listing to building an Amazon-scale autonomous commerce empire.

social.title: Social & TikTok Commerce
social.desc: Dominate short-form video, viral mechanics, and social commerce across all platforms.

ai.title: AI & AGI Integration
ai.desc: Leverage cutting-edge AI, AGI principles, and future ASI frameworks for unstoppable growth.

levels.title: 10 Levels of Mastery
levels.subtitle: A structured path from absolute beginner to autonomous mega-scale marketing genius.

coach.title: Your Coach
coach.name: Coach Roued El Fadhel
coach.role: Digital Marketing Strategist & AI Commerce Pioneer
coach.bio: Coach Roued El Fadhel is a pioneering digital marketing strategist and the founder of Prize2Pride. With deep expertise spanning traditional e-commerce, AI-augmented marketing, and the emerging frontiers of AGI-driven commerce, he has designed this encyclopedia to be the definitive guide for the next generation of digital entrepreneurs.

codincloud.name: CodinCloud
codincloud.desc: Prize2Pride is proudly powered by CodinCloud — the technology infrastructure partner enabling this platform's AI capabilities, multilingual architecture, and scalable delivery.

ai_tutor.title: Coach Roued AI Avatar
ai_tutor.subtitle: Your personal AI guide — ask anything about the course
ai_tutor.welcome: Welcome! I am Coach Roued El Fadhel's AI Avatar. I am here to guide you through your Digital Marketing 5.0 journey. What would you like to learn today?
